allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "Fix run_player_command discarding %player% replacement" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- The Kotlin lambda in the `.map` call returned only the result of `it.replace\("%victim%", ...\)`, discarding the `%player%` replacement since the two calls weren''t chained
- Commands always contained a literal `%player%` instead of the player''s name
- Chained the `.replace\(\)` calls so both substitutions take effect

## Test plan
- [ ] Configure a `run_player_command` effect with both `%player%` and `%victim%` placeholders
- [ ] Verify both placeholders resolve correctly in the executed command
EOF
\)")
